products.name: Applanix POS MV
products.descriptor: Marine GNSS-aided inertial position and orientation system

evidence.snippet:
#### Applanix POS MV
Robust and accurate full six degrees of freedom, this marine solution puts your destination in its sights.

products.name: Applanix POS AV
products.descriptor: Airborne GNSS-inertial position and orientation system for direct georeferencing

evidence.snippet:
#### Applanix POS AV
Designed for direct georeferencing of airborne sensor data to zero in on tasks faster and more cost effectively

products.name: Applanix POS LV
products.descriptor: Land vehicle GNSS-inertial positioning system for mobile mapping

evidence.snippet:
#### Applanix POS LV
Stable, reliable and repeatable positioning solutions for land-based vehicles—even in GNSS-challenged locations

products.name: Autonomy Development Platform
products.descriptor: GNSS-inertial navigation platform for autonomous vehicle development

evidence.snippet:
#### Autonomy Development Platform
Navigation solutions that enable automakers, heavy equipment OEMs and suppliers to shift driverless tech into a higher gear.

products.name: Applanix POSPac
products.descriptor: Post-processing software suite for positioning and orientation data

evidence.snippet:
#### Applanix POSPac
A family of reliable land, sea and air solutions for your post-processing positioning and orientation data needs.

products.name: Trimble APX RTX
products.descriptor: Premium GNSS-inertial OEM board for UAV direct georeferencing

evidence.snippet:
#### Trimble APX RTX
The Trimble APX RTX offers premium direct georeferencing solutions for UAV mapping sensors, enabling OEMs and drone payload integrators to easily achieve high-accuracy mapping in variable environments.

products.name: Trimble APX UAV
products.descriptor: Compact lightweight GNSS+INS OEM solution for UAV mapping

evidence.snippet:
#### Trimble APX UAV
A high-performance GNSS-inertial (GNSS + INS) OEM solution for UAVs, offering enhanced mapping efficiency and accuracy in a compact and lightweight design

products.name: Trimble AP+ Air
products.descriptor: Compact OEM GNSS+INS system for UAV and crewed airborne direct georeferencing

evidence.snippet:
#### Trimble AP+ Air
The Trimble AP+ Air GNSS-inertial (GNSS + INS) system is a compact and versatile OEM solution designed for robust airborne positioning and direct georeferencing, seamlessly compatible with both UAVs and crewed platforms

products.name: Applanix AP+ Land
products.descriptor: Dual GNSS OEM INS system with IN-Fusion+ firmware for land mobile mapping

evidence.snippet:
#### Applanix AP+ Land
Next-gen Trimble AP+ Land GNSS-inertial (GNSS + INS) OEM system with dual GNSS, onboard IMU, and Applanix IN-Fusion+ firmware for robust land mobile mapping and positioning

products.name: Trimble PX-1 RTX
products.descriptor: Advanced air mobility module for UAV navigation, guidance and control

evidence.snippet:
#### Trimble PX-1 RTX
Advanced air mobility solution for UAV navigation, guidance and control

unresolved_questions: All 10 individual product detail pages were budget-skipped; ndaa, blue_uas, and precise granularity/readiness for each product cannot be confirmed without fetching them.
Applanix POSPac is described as 'a family' on the brochure page — individual software SKUs (e.g. POSPac MMS, POSPac UAV) not enumerable from the single fetched page.
Autonomy Development Platform may be an engineering-services engagement rather than a catalog product — the product detail page was not fetched.
